/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o MangroveIPlug.vst3/Contents/MacOS/MangroveIPlug CMakeFiles/MangroveIPlug_VST3.dir/MangrovePlugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MangroveIPlug_VST3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/VST3/IPlugVST3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MangroveIPlug_VST3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/VST3/IPlugVST3_Controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MangroveIPlug_VST3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/VST3/IPlugVST3_Processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MangroveIPlug_VST3.dir/__/__/external/iplug2/IPlug/VST3/IPlugVST3_ProcessorBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MangroveIPlug_VST3.dir/__/__/external/vst3sdk/public.sdk/source/vst/vstsinglecomponenteffect.cpp.o  libiplug2_lib.a ../DSP/libcompressor_chain.a ../../lib/Release/libsdk.a ../../lib/Release/libpluginterfaces.a -framework Cocoa -framework Metal -framework MetalKit -framework QuartzCore -framework CoreAudio -framework AudioToolbox -framework CoreMIDI -framework Accelerate ../../lib/Release/libsdk_common.a ../../lib/Release/libpluginterfaces.a ../../lib/Release/libbase.a
